messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0053",
  "title": "老产品复兴依赖不惧风险的深度重构 新品突围靠成熟模型下的微创新设计",
  "page_index": 17,
  "page_range": "17"
}

Section text:
## 老产品复兴依赖不惧风险的深度重构 新品突围靠成熟模型下的微创新设计

message.content: This section addresses strategic product development and lifecycle management. It can answer retrieval questions regarding: (1) What strategy is required to successfully revive legacy products? (Deep, risk-tolerant reconstruction.) (2) How can new products achieve market breakthroughs? (Micro-innovation design within mature, established models.) (3) What are the contrasting innovation paradigms for old versus new products? The section presents a core claim differentiating risk-embracing structural overhaul for old products from incremental, framework-based refinement for new products. No specific entities, dates, definitions, procedures, metrics, tables, figures, or empirical evidence types are provided in this heading-only excerpt.
